message: No primary Corbelli 2014 VLA+GBT HI map in data/raw/phase6f/primary/corbelli2014_hi. Gratier 2010 reference FITS present but do NOT satisfy G1.
No Corbelli 2014 BVIgi stellar map in data/raw/phase6f/primary/corbelli2014_stellar_mass.
WCS/grid metadata cannot be verified without primary maps.
Unit documentation exists but primary maps not present to verify headers.
No primary HI map; uncertainty/mask rules not applicable.
Source registry, access notes, and citations documented.
Primary HI and stellar maps must be present before reprojection can be validated.
